title: Original Pokemon Battle Music
description: Adds Original Pokemon Battle Music To Be Used With Cobblemon Version 1.4!
body:
In Cobblemon Version 1.4 there are battle music events that are used but nothing plays, this resource pack changes that!

The Pack Includes Music From The Following Games:
- Pokemon Red/Green/Blue/Yellow (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Gold/Silver/Crystal (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Ruby/Sapphire/Emerald (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon FireRed/LeafGreen (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Colosseum (Trainer)
- Pokemon XD (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Diamond/Pearl/Platinum (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon HeartGold/SoulSilver (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Battle Revolution (Trainer)
- Pokemon Black/White/Black 2/White 2 (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon X/Y (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Omega Ruby/Alpha Sapphire (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Sun/Moon/Ultra Sun/Ultra Moon (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Let's Go Pikachu/Let's Go Eevee (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Sword/Shield (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Brilliant Diamond/Shining Pearl (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Legends: Arceus (Wild and Trainer)
- Pokemon Scarlet/Violet (Wild and Trainer)
